marketValueUnit: raw EUR divided by 1,000,000 for frontend EUR millions
scoreFormula: Role-aware category percentiles scaled to 0-99. aiQualityScore ranks selected players by role-weighted average category score percentile and maps to configured scoreRange.
unknownFields: recovered SofaScore raw metrics remain UNKNOWN only when a selected player lacks a source value
futureProjection marketValue and aiQualityScore until model output exists
warnings: Only 7105 eligible unique players were available for exportLimit 10000.
Future projection values remain zero placeholders because no model output is connected.
High-R2 benchmark predictions are market-aware estimates and should not be treated as clean future forecasts.
modelStatus: No .pkl model files were loaded or connected.
frontendStatus: Frontend imports generated JSON via src/data/generatedData.js
